net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.graphics

Class ColorHelper

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.graphics.ColorHelper

  • public final class ColorHelper
extends java.lang.Object
    Unified coloring system for Paxelerate.
    Since:
    0.5
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    marc.engelmann, raoul.rothfeld
